title: Nayxo's Trailer Modpack
description: A modpack made to make minecraft feel like mojang's trailers
body:
This modpack is made to make minecraft feel like mojang's trailers.


It's main focus is to add features like shaders and texture packs like bare bones to give minecraft this trailer feel.


It also expend onto vanilla with some vanilla+ features such as waypoints (with no maps !) as well as backpacks !


Here are some ingame screenshots to showcase the modpack :


![overworld](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8a3a90ab22cbd438dd6694343eaba299867767cb.jpeg)

![nether](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a79e2678a1df8aa821e8b9135e8940d26229b2c8.jpeg)

![end](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8c51de5dde028d01e7dbd78cfc088995451fc32d.jpeg)


Sidenote : Feel free to join the discord if there is any issues with the Modpack (Rendering Issues, Crashes, Error Messages, Game Not Launching, Specific mods crashing the game...) It helps us greatly improve the work we do and provide the best for you all !
